title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. The incident occurred Monday morning.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's role as a hub for advanced manufacturing and technology innovation.

title: Local NICU Nurse Celebrated During National Nurses Week

title: Suspect Found Hiding in Ceiling of Gastonia Hospital
summary: Two suspects were arrested after being flagged by Flock surveillance cameras for driving stolen motorcycles. One was found hiding in a hospital ceiling.

title: Pleasant Temperatures and Scattered Showers Forecasted
summary: A cold front is expected to bring scattered showers and thunderstorms on Monday, with sunshine returning by Tuesday.

title: Kristoffer Reitan Wins Truist Championship in Charlotte

title: Overnight Shooting Claims Two Lives in Charlotte
